collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (12 total Queries, 12 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT MONTH(date) as month, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as income, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as expense FROM `tbl_transaction` WHERE `status` = 0 GROUP BY YEAR(date), MONTH(date) ORDER BY YEAR(date), MONTH(date) LIMIT 12

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT MONTH(date) as month, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as income, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as expense FROM `tbl_transaction` WHERE `status` = 0 GROUP BY YEAR(date), MONTH(date) ORDER BY YEAR(date), MONTH(date) LIMIT 12
